summary: Design system improvements testing completed successfully. All CSS/font changes verified working: Inter font consolidated across all pages, hero headline 60px on desktop, all 8 landing page sections render correctly, login/signup/dashboard pages load properly, authentication flow works, WebP screenshots visible, cookie consent banner renders.
critical_code_review_comments: Inter font correctly loaded via Google Fonts in index.html
Tailwind config fontFamily all point to Inter (sans, heading, body, display)
Hero headline uses text-4xl/5xl/6xl responsive classes - verified 60px on desktop
Surface color tokens defined in tailwind.config.js (surface-base, surface-elevated, surface-background, surface-hover)
Shadow hierarchy simplified to 3 levels (card, hover, modal) in both tailwind.config.js and index.css
Input min-height 44px set in .input class for accessibility
Focus-visible states with brand purple ring (#7C3AED) implemented globally
Driver.js tour popover styles updated to use Inter font
btn-secondary now uses bg-brand-100 text-brand-700 (light purple background)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Design system changes verified: (1) Font - Inter only, no Raleway/Instrument Sans, (2) Hero headline - 60px on desktop (text-6xl), (3) All 8 landing page sections render, (4) Surface tokens, shadow hierarchy, input min-height 44px all working, (5) Auth flow with HTTP-only cookies working, (6) WebP screenshots loading correctly.

Landing_Page_Loads.details: Landing page at / loads with hero section visible

Inter_Font_Hero.details: Hero headline uses Inter font (verified via computed style)

Hero_Headline_Size.details: Hero headline is 60px on desktop (text-6xl class)

Landing_Page_8_Sections.details: All 8 sections found: Hero, Problem, Solution, Features, Testimonials, Stats, Urgency, Final CTA + Footer

Login_Page_Loads.details: Login page at /login loads with email/password form

Signup_Page_Loads.details: Signup page at /signup loads with 5 input fields

Dashboard_After_Login.details: Dashboard loads after login with Inter font, shows welcome message

No_Vite_CSS_Errors.details: No Vite error overlay on any page

Cookie_Consent_Banner.details: Cookie consent banner renders on landing and login pages
